emails.subject: Re: Community Health Outreach Coordinator at BayCare
emails.content:
Hi Rachel,

Thanks for reaching out. The outreach coordinator role sounds interesting and I'd like to learn more.

A few questions. What does a typical week look like for this position? How much is community-facing events vs. administrative work? And is the schedule flexible or strictly 8-5?

I've been doing clinical PT for about 15 years and the community health side has always appealed to me.

Eric Harris

emails.subject: Re: Community Health Outreach Coordinator at BayCare
emails.content:
Hi Eric,

Great questions.

The role is roughly 60% community-facing (health fairs, workshops, presentations at community centers and faith-based organizations) and 40% planning and reporting. Typical schedule is Monday through Friday, but there are occasional evening or weekend events, maybe 2-3 per month.

You'd be part of a four-person Community Health team reporting to our Director of Community Health. The position is based at our Clearwater campus but covers the greater Tampa Bay and Central Florida service area.

We'd love to set up a phone screen to tell you more about the team and the role. Do you have availability in the next two weeks for a 20-minute call?

Best,
Rachel Moran
